title: Connections, Channel Ownership, Heartbeats, and Recovery · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a cancellable connection and channel recovery state machine with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a cancellable connection and channel recovery state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Assign channel ownership by publisher or consumer lifecycle and prevent concurrent confirm, acknowledgement, and topology operations from corrupting assumptions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Recovery Order Generation
steps.instruction:
Order the Recovery Order Generation RabbitMQ and Go messaging evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Recovery Order Generation.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Recovery Order Generation assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Recovery Order Generation, keep Recovery Order Generation connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A debug Go messaging team handles case 1555 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Recover connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale notifications and deliveries.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Recovery Order Generation has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Recovery Order Generation, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Recovery Order Generation precondition, or invariant that must hold.

Build deterministic Go evidence to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Recover connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale notifications and deliveries.

For RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Recovery Order Generation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Once automatic recovery reports open, old channel references, deliveries, and consumer tags become valid again.

options.text: Declare RabbitMQ and Go outcome, topology, ownership, identity, and byte, time, attempt, and concurrency budgets for the debug Recovery Order Generation case
Predict RabbitMQ and Go publish, route, custody, delivery, effect, failure, cancellation, and recovery outcomes for the debug Recovery Order Generation case
Run the smallest deterministic RabbitMQ and Go messaging model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the debug Recovery Order Generation case
Inject one changed RabbitMQ and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup, and state live-broker transfer limits for the debug Recovery Order Generation case

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Recovery Order Generation
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-recovery-order-generation-1i2dcp" that uses case 8954 to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.

At RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Recovery Order Generation, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go messaging team handles case 5698 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then lower the byte and goroutine budget and preserve rejection evidence. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Recover connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale notifications and deliveries.

For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Recovery Order Generation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Once automatic recovery reports open, old channel references, deliveries, and consumer tags become valid again.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Recovery Order Generation
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Recovery Order Generation: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go messaging team handles case 6603 during consumer shutdown drill with one blocked handler goroutine. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound heartbeat and recovery delay while rejecting stale channel-generation notifications; keep credentials and connection URLs out of output; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Recover connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale notifications and deliveries.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Recovery Order Generation.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Recovery Order Generation, keep Recovery Order Generation connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
